metadata.title: Why Fixing the Model Didn't Fix the Bias
metadata.purpose: vox-explainer slate cut of Computational Skepticism for AI candidate 12. Source chapter: books/computational-skepticism-for-ai/chapters/06-bias-where-it-enters-and-who-is-responsible.md (leverage analysis section only).
metadata.color_semantics: TEAL = high-leverage intervention / blocked high-flow path / effective fix; CRIMSON = bias flow / low-leverage fix / flow rerouting around a block
metadata.note: EXCLUSIONS: no Pearl do-calculus notation, no ten-mechanism taxonomy, no fairness metrics, cap the graph at 6 nodes — the three teams are one sentence each, not three scenes
_variant_todo: rewrite every beat narration_text in the Teardown register (voices/teardown/VOICE.md + CLAUDE-BRAND.md) — voice only, facts unchanged
signature tangent 0-1 per video, ONLY on a clear opportunity (see SKILL)
swap the outro to the Claude outro from AUTHOR.MD :: NikBearBrown
then build audience-namespaced (audio in the new voice, scenes in the new palette)

skin_warnings: B01: palette=claude but the cold open is 'un-annotated' — COLD OPEN LAW wants ClaudeComposerAsk
B15: palette=claude but the outro is 'OutroCTA' — OUTRO LAW wants ClaudeTitleOutro

beats.narration_text: This is Liam, in for Bear. Why fixing the model didn't fix the bias.

card.copy:
Why Fixing the Model
Didn't Fix the Bias

build.suggested: suggested prompt: This is Liam, in for Bear. Why fixing the model didn't fix the bias.

beats.narration_text: Two expert teams — one rewrote the loss function, one resampled the data. Both produced small reductions. A third team changed nothing in the model and cut the disparity tenfold.

build.suggested: suggested prompt: Two expert teams — one rewrote the loss function, one resampled the data. Both produced small reductions. A third team changed nothing in the model and cut the

beats.narration_text: Why did two correct fixes barely move the bias — and where was the leverage actually hiding?

props.headline: Why did two correct fixes barely move the bias — and…

card.copy: Why did two correct fixes barely move the bias — and where was the leverage actually hiding?

beats.narration_text: The natural assumption: bias lives in the model. Fix the model's learning rule, fix the disparity. Reasonable. And mostly wrong.

build.suggested: suggested prompt: The natural assumption: bias lives in the model. Fix the model's learning rule, fix the disparity. Reasonable. And mostly wrong.

beats.narration_text: Bias flows from protected attribute to outcome along three parallel paths — model, proxy features, and deployment context. An intervention only blocks the path it sits on.

build.suggested: suggested prompt: Bias flows from protected attribute to outcome along three parallel paths — model, proxy features, and deployment context. An intervention only blocks the path

beats.narration_text: The team that succeeded drew a different kind of picture.

props.headline: The team that succeeded drew a different kind of picture.

beats.image_description: A whiteboard with a causal diagram drawn in marker, arrows connecting boxes labeled with pipeline stages, in a conference room setting

build.suggested: suggested prompt: The team that succeeded drew a different kind of picture.

beats.narration_text: Draw the full causal chain. Bias flows down each pipe simultaneously. Block one, and the flow reroutes through the others.

build.suggested: suggested prompt: Draw the full causal chain. Bias flows down each pipe simultaneously. Block one, and the flow reroutes through the others.

beats.narration_text: Most algorithmic interventions block one path — the one running through the model's parameters — and leave the proxy paths and the deployment-context paths fully open.

build.suggested: suggested prompt: Most algorithmic interventions block one path — the one running through the model's parameters — and leave the proxy paths and the deployment-context paths full

beats.narration_text: Team one blocked the model path. The flow rerouted through the proxy and review pipes. The bias barely moved.

build.suggested: suggested prompt: Team one blocked the model path. The flow rerouted through the proxy and review pipes. The bias barely moved.

beats.narration_text: Team three blocked the deployment-context pipe — the one carrying most of the flow. The disparity fell ninety percent.

build.suggested: suggested prompt: Team three blocked the deployment-context pipe — the one carrying most of the flow. The disparity fell ninety percent.

beats.narration_text: You can intervene on what is in your house. But your intervention will be at the wrong leverage point, and the disparity will persist.

build.suggested: suggested prompt: You can intervene on what is in your house. But your intervention will be at the wrong leverage point, and the disparity will persist.

beats.narration_text: A lending model shows a twenty-two point approval gap between groups. Engineers retrain it without protected attributes — the gap in the model's learned weights drops to seven points. But zip code remains in the features and carries eighteen points of the original gap on its own path. Final approval gap: twenty points. The model fix moved the flow. It didn't stop it.

build.suggested: suggested prompt: A lending model shows a twenty-two point approval gap between groups. Engineers retrain it without protected attributes — the gap in the model's learned weights

beats.narration_text: The model is never the only pipe. Find the one carrying the most flow.

props.headline: The model is never the only pipe. Find the one carrying…

card.copy: The model is never the only pipe.
card.sub: Find the one carrying the most flow.

beats.name: OutroSeries
